title: storage — authorization policies
description: Three policies. FilePolicy is the primary gate — every workspace-facing route defers to it. FileVariantPolicy inherits from FilePolicy (variants inherit their parent's ability). ChunkedUploadPolicy governs the in-flight upload lifecycle.

viewAny.description: List files in the workspace. Every workspace member with `files.viewAny` permission passes.

view.description: Read a single file. Additional gates: (a) workspace scope match, (b) visibility check — `restricted` files require the caller to be the owner OR a workspace admin OR to hold `files.admin`, (c) virus_scan_state must be `clean` unless caller holds `files.admin`.

upload.description: Create a new file. Additional gates: (a) storage.bytes.consumed entitlement has capacity, (b) storage.files.max_per_workspace slot available, (c) kind is registered + caller is allowed to upload this kind (checked against the FileKindRegistry's per-kind permission override).

update.description: Update mutable fields (name, visibility, metadata). Cannot change kind / size / mime. Caller must be the owner OR a workspace admin OR hold `files.admin`.

delete.description: Soft-delete a file. Same restrictions as update.

issueSignedUrl.description: Explicitly issue a signed URL with custom TTL / IP-lock / user-lock / one-time-use. Restricted to `files.admin` when the reason is `share` OR the TTL exceeds the plan's default ceiling.

revokeSignedUrls.description: Bulk revoke every active signed URL for a file. Admin-only — protects against legitimate ongoing downloads being killed by a workspace member.

reprocessVariants.description: Force regeneration of every variant. Admin-only.

view.description: Variants inherit the parent File's `view` gate. This policy is a thin delegate to FilePolicy::view($caller, $variant->file).

policies.note: No standalone lifecycle for variants — they are always managed via the parent File's actions (reprocessVariants + parent hard-delete cascade).

view.description: Read a ChunkedUpload's state during upload / resume. Restricted to the owner (the user who initiated).

update.description: Patch a chunk. Restricted to the owner. Also enforces state machine (state != completed / aborted / expired).

finalize.description: Transition state to finalizing/completed. Restricted to the owner. Enforces uploaded_bytes == total_size_bytes.

abort.description: Transition state to aborted. Restricted to the owner OR workspace admin.

note: SignedUrlAudit has NO policy — the audit trail is admin-view-only, gated by the `platform.storage.view` permission on the platform-admin route directly. Workspace members cannot enumerate their own signed URLs; they can only revoke via the parent File.
